KeysToEntries.TelemetryBody: With your consent, we would like to automatically collect information from this device via a new player activity plugin. This information allows our team to review how players use systems and play the game to better address issues, expand on old systems, or add new features. With both activity and player feedback we are able to make better decisions about the future of the game. If you choose, we can also use this information to offer a better online advertising experience.
KeysToEntries.EOSMoreInfoBody: Epic Online Services is required for online security and for future cross-play. For more information see Epic's Frequently Asked Questions page (it will open in a web browser).
KeysToEntries.FailedToCreateWorldErrorBody: Unable to create world! Please make sure you haven't already created a world with that name.
KeysToEntries.HostClosedConnectionErrorBody: The Host has closed the connection. Please try again.
KeysToEntries.FailedToJoinServerErrorBosy: Unable to connect to server! Please try a different server.
KeysToEntries.ConfirmDeleteCharacterBody: Are you sure you want to delete this character?
KeysToEntries.ConfirmDeleteWorldBody: Are you sure you want to delete this world?
KeysToEntries.NetworkLogoutReturnToMenusBody: You have been returned to the main menu, we will attempt to login again
KeysToEntries.NoCharactersAvailableErrorBody: Please create a character to create or join a game.
KeysToEntries.NetworkUnknownErrorBody: An unknown network error has occurred. Please try again.
KeysToEntries.CharacterNameExistsErrorBody: A character with this name already exists. Please choose a different name or go back and delete the existing character.
KeysToEntries.RestartGameBody: Please restart the game for all changes to take effect.
KeysToEntries.DedicatedServersNotAvailableBody: We're sorry, but Dedicated Servers are not available yet.
KeysToEntries.ServerPrivacyPromptBody: How do you want to play?
KeysToEntries.ConfirmResetKeybindingsBody:
Are your sure you want to reset all keybindings to default?
This will erase all your custom controls and cannot be undone.
KeysToEntries.EOSRequiredToPlayOnlineBody: Epic Online Services account required to play online. You can link your platform account with an Epic Online Services account in the settings.
KeysToEntries.ServerSearchBody: No worlds found matching that name!
KeysToEntries.CharacterIncompatibleWithWorldError: You are not able to join this world with this character type.
KeysToEntries.ConfirmExitCharacterCreationBody: Are you sure you want to leave character creation? Your changes will be lost.
KeysToEntries.ConfirmExitCharacterCreationBodyFTUE: You cannot create or join a world without a character. Are you sure you want to skip character creation?
KeysToEntries.CustomSearchUnavailable: Please wait a bit before searching or filtering again.
KeysToEntries.TimeoutWorldListReceived: Timeout while retrieving world list. Please try again.
